Ordering Information

Specialty & Custom Orders

For carved pieces, custom profiles, or replica work — please provide the following when enquiring:

  • Drawings and specifications
  • Full-size layouts if available
  • For replicas: photographs and measurements of the existing piece
Start Your Order
01
Limestone · Artisan Craft

Carving

Indiana limestone is a remarkable stone — ranging from warm buff to cool blue-gray, prized across generations for its workability and its unique capacity to accept and retain crisp, intricate detail. Today's carvers are a diverse group of artisans, many continuing family traditions alongside those who shaped the craft before them. Their skill brings each design to life with timeless precision.

Custom Commission

When ordering a specialty carving, please provide: drawings and specifications, any full-size layouts available, and — for replica work — photographs and measurements of the existing piece. Our team will review and confirm feasibility before quoting.

Request a Quote for Carving →
02
Limestone · Architectural

Balusters & Balustrades

Limestone balusters have always been a popular choice — whether for a simple renovation or a complex new construction. Balusters and balustrades are used at entryways, walkways, or as hardscape features. Our solid limestone balusters highlight large and small balconies, patios, staircases, and pool areas. We produce balusters of the highest quality — visually consistent in both colour and form, so your entire project carries a unified architectural character.

Repair & Renovation Matching

Our renovation specialists identify exact matches for existing limestone architectural features. We precisely match the colour, texture, and design of your existing baluster or balustrade — providing an architectural detail that blends seamlessly into the look and feel of the original building. Our expertise in limestone forming, colour matching, and finishing ensures your new balusters integrate perfectly throughout the project.

Request a Quote for Balusters & Balustrades →
03
Limestone · Masonry

Banding & String Courses

Banding — also known as string coursing — is one of the most cost-effective ways to add proportion, detail, and visual definition to any masonry structure. Designed to integrate seamlessly with common brick sizes, it creates a refined transitional element that elevates the entire facade. Custom banding profiles are also available for non-standard applications.

Available Profiles

Flat rectangular profile, clean and timeless

Single rounded leading edge, softened profile

Both edges rounded, flowing horizontal line

One angled reveal, adds subtle shadow line

Both edges angled, strong directional shadow

Rough split texture, raw material character

Any profile to specification

Request a Quote for Banding & String Courses →
04
Limestone · Architectural

Columns

Finely crafted Indiana Limestone columns are the ultimate expression of timeless beauty in natural stone. Every column we deliver is handcrafted by skilled stone artisans to match any classic or contemporary style — to your exact specifications. We know that columns are the showpiece of the project, which is why we craft and deliver each base, shaft, and capital with great artistry and precision.

Available Profiles

Short and heavy with simple round capitals. Strength and dignity.

Slender pillars with large base and signature scrolled capitals.

Slender, fluted columns with intricate carved capitals.

Plain base and unfluted shaft. Understated and versatile.

A refined blend of Ionic scrolls and Corinthian ornamentation.

Any classical or contemporary profile to specification.

Request a Quote for Columns →
05
Limestone · Architectural

Door & Window Surrounds

Door and window surrounds add formal flair to any masonry structure. The style of the building is an integral part of choosing surrounds that best fit the architecture — contemporary modern designs as well as classic traditional surrounds are available. Custom door and window surrounds are also available to any specification.

Available Profiles

Clean rectangular reveal, timeless and versatile

Both reveals angled, strong directional detail

Rounded leading edge, softened classical profile

One angled edge, adds architectural shadow line

Rough split texture surround, organic character

Any profile or configuration to specification

Request a Quote for Door & Window Surrounds →
06
Limestone · Architectural

Jack Arches

Beautifully cut jack arches define windows and doors with subtle sophistication. These building elements are a cost-effective way to reflect the personal style of your project. Jack arches are designed for either two or three piece installation — and when combined with jambs and a sill, they make a stunning architectural statement.

Available Profiles

Standard flat wedge arch, clean and proportional

Recessed centre panel adds depth and dimension

Angled edge detail, refined directional shadow

To specification

Request a Quote for Jack Arches →
07
Limestone · Detail

Keystones

Keystones originated as the final wedge-shaped piece that held together a stone arch. Today, they are still used in that manner or can be used individually as an accent piece above any window or door opening. Adding a keystone gives a clean, polished look to any commercial or residential structure.

Available Profiles

Standard projecting keystone, classic presence

Recessed centre panel, adds visual depth

Angled edges, clean contemporary refinement

Carved or profiled to specification

Request a Quote for Keystones →
08
Limestone · Hardscape

Pavers

Indiana limestone pavers are the perfect choice for many outdoor spaces — prized for their timeless beauty and ability to weather well while maintaining reliable traction even in wet conditions. Limestone pavers are low maintenance, long-lasting, and offer the perfect marriage of modern clean lines with traditional natural materials. Available in a variety of colours, cuts, and textures to suit any project.

Weather Resistant Low-maintenance in Canadian climate
Natural Traction Safe in wet conditions year-round
Timeless Beauty Colour deepens gracefully with age
Request a Quote for Pavers →
09
Limestone · Finishing

Pier Caps

Available in 2¼" and 3" thicknesses as well as a variety of lengths and widths to meet your needs, our limestone pier caps are available in rock face or square edge finishes. We offer pier caps in Full Colour Blend (FCB) and Gray — providing timeless options for residential and commercial applications.

Thicknesses 2¼" and 3"
Finishes Rock Face · Square Edge
Colours Full Colour Blend (FCB) · Gray
Availability Standard and custom lengths and widths
Request a Quote for Pier Caps →
10
Limestone · Masonry

Quoins

Simple and classic, quoins create a wonderful visual contrast to masonry veneer. These can be installed one on top of the other or divided by another form of exterior cladding. Versatile in application, quoins add definition, permanence, and elegance to any corner — residential or commercial.

Available Profiles

Single piece corner block, clean and bold

Angled edges both sides, refined shadow

Split into two for flexible installation

Chamfered profile in two-piece format

Mitered joint for seamless corner wrap

Request a Quote for Quoins →
11
Limestone · Architectural

Sills

Sills are among the most essential architectural elements — adding understated style to any project. Slip sills are designed to align seamlessly with the width of the masonry opening. Lug sills extend beyond the window, allowing for the installation of a full surround and a more pronounced architectural presence. Custom sills are also available.

Slip Sill vs Lug Sill

Slip sills sit flush within the masonry opening. Lug sills project beyond the window frame — use a lug sill when installing a full surround system for the most architecturally complete result.

Available Profiles

Flush with opening, clean simple profile

Rounded leading edge, softened profile

Sloped top, standard drainage profile

Dual pitch top, enhanced water runoff

Standard slope with drip-edge lip detail

Any profile to specification

Request a Quote for Sills →
12
Limestone · Finishing

Wall Caps

Wall caps provide a clean, elegant finish to any masonry wall. Beyond their aesthetic appeal, they offer cost-effective protection — enhancing structural integrity while shielding the wall from harsh weather. Available in a variety of stone and precast options, combining durability with timeless design.

Available Profiles

Flat top profile, clean and versatile

Curved top surface, gentle organic form

Dual-pitched top for superior water shedding

Rounded leading edge, refined classic detail

Ornate traditional profile, heritage character

Split face texture, raw stone character

Any profile to specification

Request a Quote for Wall Caps →
13
Limestone · Masonry

Water Tables

The water table is a powerful building element that makes a strong architectural statement. Positioned at the base of a wall or at key horizontal transitions, water tables create seamless continuity to window sills or banding — providing a streamlined, well-proportioned look to any project. Elegant, functional, and built to endure.

Available Profiles

Clean flat profile, understated elegance

Both edges angled, strong directional detail

One angled reveal, refined shadow line

S-curve profile, the most decorative option

To specification

Request a Quote for Water Tables →
14
Limestone · Cladding

Veneers

Indiana Limestone veneers are the most versatile product in our range — available in thin and full bed depth profiles, each suited to different structural requirements and design intentions. 100% natural stone, no aggregates, no artificial colours. The same geological formation that supplied stone for the Empire State Building, the National Cathedral, and the Biltmore Estate.

No Aggregate 100% natural stone, as formed by nature
No Footing Thin veneers install over existing masonry
50% Faster Masons install thin veneer 50% faster than full bed
Request a Quote for Veneers →

Five Veneer Systems — Complete Specifications

Thin Bed 1¼" depth

Smooth

Our most popular thin veneer. Smooth, refined, and consistent — also known as planed, honed, bugged, or circular sanded. Requires no footing or foundation. Installs directly over existing masonry.

Footing Not required
Heights 4", 8", 12"
Length 24"
Depth 1¼"
Coverage ~135 sq ft per ton
Colours Full colour blend · Buff · Gray
Request a Quote →
Thin Bed ¾"–1¼" depth

Split Face & Tumbled

Thin Indiana Limestone with natural texture and character. Versatile, durable, and fast to install. Available in split face and tumbled finishes — ideal for non-load-bearing walls and renovation cladding.

Footing Not required
Split Heights 2¼", 5", 7¾", 10½"
Tumbled Heights 2"–12"
Length Random
Depth ¾"–1¼"
Colours Full colour blend · Buff · Gray
Request a Quote →
Full Bed Depth 4" depth

Smooth

Precision-cut modular units made from the same naturally durable Indiana Limestone used in many of the world's most renowned buildings. Competitively priced against engineered or cast stone alternatives.

Footing Required
Heights 4", 8", 12", 16"
Length 24" or 36"
Depth 4"
Colours Full bed · Gray · Full colour blend
Request a Quote →
Full Bed Depth 3"–4" depth

Split Face

Split face full bed depth veneer exhibits the beauty of subtle colour and grain variations inherent in natural stone. Adds a sense of permanence and lasting value to any residential or commercial project.

Footing Required
Heights 2¼", 5", 7¾", 10½"
Length Random
Depth 3"–4"
Colours Full colour blend · Buff · Gray
Request a Quote →
Full Bed Depth 3"–5" depth

Tumbled

Tumbled Indiana Limestone develops a graceful natural patina over time. Its natural variations in colour, texture, and finish enhance any architectural style — the perfect complement to brick and other building materials.

Footing Required
Heights 2"–12"
Length Varies
Depth 3"–5"
Colours Full colour blend
Request a Quote →
Request a Quote for Veneers
Stone Colours

The Natural Palette.

Indiana Limestone occurs in three colour families — each varying in tone from piece to piece, the way only natural stone can.

Buff

Varies from a light creamy shade to a brownish buff. The most widely specified colour family across residential and commercial projects.

Gray

Varies from a light silvery gray to shades of bluish gray. Crisp and architectural — a favourite for contemporary facades.

Variegated

A mix of gray and buff colours with a variety of tones in between. Natural variation from piece to piece is part of its character.

Glacier Buff
Prairie Blend
Standard Buff
Northern Gray
Alabama Fleuri
Silver Buff
Northern Buff
Silver Shadow
Standard Gray
Sunset Canyon
Sterling
Full Colour Blend
Champagne Plains
Natural Strata
Gray
Buff

Colours shown are approximate representations of natural limestone. Request physical samples for accurate colour assessment.

Send us your drawings, specifications, or inspiration. We'll confirm availability, pricing, and lead times within one business day.
